preconditions: poster is for e-commerce flash sale or promotion
strategy: Add 'bold red CTA button' and 'high contrast white text' to the prompt
Use 'vibrant commercial photography' and 'cinematic lighting' keywords
Ensure background leaves clear space for price/tag overlay in edit_plan

preconditions: generated image has blurry, missing, or unreadable Chinese text
strategy: In edit_plan, replace vague 'add text' with specific font style and position
Request 'large modern sans-serif Chinese font' with 'strong contrast shadow'
Limit text elements to 1 headline + 1 CTA per edit round

preconditions: brand tone includes elegant, warm, natural, or premium descriptors
strategy: Use 'elegant minimalist photography', 'soft natural lighting', 'pastel tones' in style_prompt
Apply asymmetric composition with generous whitespace in composition_prompt
Keep edit_plan to 2 rounds: headline overlay + subtle QR/tag placement

preconditions: poster is for tech product launch or AI conference
strategy: Use 'futuristic tech visual', 'neon accent lights', 'dark moody background with particles' in style_prompt
Apply dynamic diagonal composition with strong contrast
Edit plan: glowing headline in tech sans-serif + event details in neon cyan + holographic CTA

preconditions: visual output lacks saturation or contrast for advertising impact
strategy: Add 'saturated colors', 'high contrast', 'vivid advertising look' to the next generation prompt
If editing existing image, instruct 'increase saturation and contrast by 30%'
Validate output file size > 100KB to ensure sufficient detail
